programme.title: Murder at the Derby
programme.desc: Tensions escalate when a woman's jealous brother puts everyone's lives in danger.

programme.title: Swindler Seduction
programme.desc: A woman tries to outsmart twin romantic con artists and serve justice for all their victims.

programme.title: Secret Liaison
programme.desc: A woman travels to Los Angeles to try to prevent her sister from going to prison for murder.

programme.title: My Life Is a Lifetime Movie
programme.desc: A high school history teacher is involved in a sex scandal with one of her students.

programme.title: Catfish Murder
programme.desc: A single mother's shy teenage son is arrested for the murder of a young woman he met online.

programme.title: The Bear Lake Murders
programme.desc: A sheriff teams up with a detective to investigate a series of annual deaths in a resort town.

programme.title: Dateless to Dangerous: My Son's Secret Life
programme.desc: An angry teen joins a shadowy online underworld when he's rejected by a few girls at school.

programme.title: My Life Is a Lifetime Movie
programme.desc: A teacher is accused of being a sex offender; a woman is obsessed with her next-door neighbors.

programme.title: Catfish Murder
programme.desc: A single mother's shy teenage son is arrested for the murder of a young woman he met online.

programme.title: The Bear Lake Murders
programme.desc: A sheriff teams up with a detective to investigate a series of annual deaths in a resort town.

programme.title: My Life Is a Lifetime Movie
programme.desc: A teacher is accused of being a sex offender; a woman is obsessed with her next-door neighbors.

programme.title: The Boy Who Vanished
programme.desc: A woman's son starts to display strange behavior when he returns a decade after his abduction.

programme.title: Snatched From the Crib
programme.desc: A woman searches for her murdered stepsister's missing baby, risking it all to uncover the truth.

programme.title: Ties That Kill
programme.desc: A teen tries to solve the disappearance of her sister and save her foster family from dark truths.

programme.title: Cellmate Secrets: Chris Watts
programme.desc: Christa Richello is writing a book with Chris Watts and her now-fiancé, Dylan, Chris' cellmate.

programme.desc: A woman's son starts to display strange behavior when he returns a decade after his abduction.
